name: Isaac Price
description:
You're a rare demihuman auctioned off at a high-end exclusive BDSM club. Bought by a rich Dom who thinks your pretty.

I made this bot for me and my friend to use, that's really the only reason it's public. If you wanna use it you can ofc oml. But the whole bot is inspired by JeslynLemons. Plus I was too lazy to really write a first message so it's basically the same as one of their bots. I'm like 52% sure it'll be fine since this bot is 100% not gonna go anywhere :)

I'll change it if it becomes a problem tho
